sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this life simulation game

special_mechanics.name: Life Simulation Gameplay
special_mechanics.description: Player controls character Pino (a robot boy) through a point-and-click interface using fairy companion Tinker. Game focuses on raising and educating Pino with character parameters (strength, kindness, luck, etc.) rather than traditional platformer physics.

special_mechanics.name: Health System
special_mechanics.description: Dual health bars: physical health (reduced by climbing, physical tasks, damage) and mental health (reduced by mental tasks, reading, social interactions). Sleep mechanic to restore health.

special_mechanics.name: Environmental Challenges
special_mechanics.description: Various physical tasks including climbing rope, combat with sword, farming, and sea exploration. Success determined by character parameters rather than real-time physics-based movement.

tier_notes: Wonder Project J is a life simulation game, not a traditional action platformer. The available Wikipedia documentation describes gameplay mechanics, character education systems, and narrative elements but contains no quantitative movement physics data. The game prioritizes character animation and interaction over precise platformer physics parameters. Tier 3 classification appropriate due to lack of technical physics documentation.
